---
title: "OERs for Users"
format: html
---

### Learning outcomes

Learners will be able to:

-   Locate OERs using reputable repositories and tools.

-   Correctly interpret open licences.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20users/User-Discovering%20OERs.html)
